sections.content: Welcome to your **free Economics** lesson on **The nature of the economic problem** (1.1). This is syllabus point 1.1 on **Paper 1 (Multiple Choice)** — structured like a premium revision course, with past-paper practice built in.

items: Master the vocabulary examiners use in mark schemes for The nature of the economic problem
Know which paper (P1) tests this topic most often
Practise at least one official past-paper question after reading
Use “Explain simpler” below if the main lesson feels too advanced

sections.content: Cambridge 2281 rewards clear definitions, labelled diagrams, and applied examples from the data. On Paper 1 (Multiple Choice), The nature of the economic problem often appears as MC items or structured questions — plan before writing longer answers.
